# o2-scalpel-perl

Scalpel refactor MCP server for Perl via perl

## Install

```bash
claude plugin install o2-scalpel-perl --from o2-scalpel
```

## Requirements

- Claude Code >= 1.0.0
- LSP server: `perl` on `$PATH`
- File extensions handled: .pl, .pm, .t

## Facades

| Facade | Summary |
|---|---|
| `scalpel_rename` | Rename a symbol within the current file |
| `scalpel_fix_lints` | Apply diagnostic quick-fixes (perlcritic, syntax) |

## Skills

This plugin ships skills under `skills/` so Claude knows when to call each facade.
